subtitle.create: Add a new goal and start tracking progress.

sections.customizeSubtitle: Optional settings for customizing your goal.

validation.startAfterDeadline: Start date cannot be after deadline
validation.startAfterEnd: Start date cannot be after end date
validation.endBeforeStart: End date cannot be before start date
validation.endBeforeDeadline: End date cannot be before deadline
validation.deadlineBeforeStart: Deadline cannot be before start date
validation.deadlineAfterEnd: Deadline cannot be after end date

reminder.title: Reminder
reminder.subtitle: Enable reminders to stay consistent with your goal.
reminder.label: Reminder Time
reminder.helperEnabled: Select when you want to be reminded
